---
title: "DJ 2024 Spring Data"
author: "Nathan Kim"
date: "2024-05-04"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(googlesheets4)
```

## DATA FILES
```{r}
spring24 <- gsheet2tbl("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1uoIvMx4FqvDA3d35Jap6JPnfej3cOhPbAQqEmJsJ3eA/edit?usp=sharing")
spring24_1 <- gsheet2tbl("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1A98ajkBU8l69J6wFN37raALQqIUAsegX6Syak8nCU0w/edit#gid=0")
spring24_2 <- gsheet2tbl("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ikYVz-T39-bimuyQ0aZqGQHIJer_DlH3DFGE9-IOszI/edit#gid=0")
```

## Linear Correlation Coefficients
```{r}
cor(spring24$`CS Percentage Difference`,spring24$`Winning Percentage Difference`)
cor(spring24$`SB Difference by team`, spring24$`Winning Percentage Difference`)
cor(spring24$`SB Difference in Success Rate by team`, spring24$`Winning Percentage Difference`)


cor(spring24_1$`SB Difference in Success Rate by team above average`, spring24_1$`Winning Percentage Difference above average`)
cor(spring24_1$`SB Difference by team`, spring24_1$`Winning Percentage Difference`,use="complete.obs")
```

#Exponential Correlation Coefficients
```{r}
model <- lm(log(spring24$`SB Difference by team`)~ spring24$`Winning Percentage Difference`)
model1 <- lm(log(spring24$`CS Percentage Difference`)~ spring24$`Winning Percentage Difference`)
model2 <- lm(log(spring24$`SB Difference in Success Rate by team`)~ spring24$`Winning Percentage Difference`)


#view the output of the model
summary(model)
summary(model1)
summary(model2)
```

## Quadratic Correlation Coefficients
```{r}
data$hours2 <- spring24$`SB Difference by team`^2

#fit quadratic regression model
quadraticModel <- lm(`Winning Percentage Difference`~ `CS Percentage Difference` + `CS Percentage Difference`^2, data=spring24)

quadraticModel1 <- lm(`Winning Percentage Difference`~ `SB Difference by team` + `SB Difference by team`^2, data=spring24)

quadraticModel2 <- lm(`Winning Percentage Difference`~ `SB Difference in Success Rate by team` + `SB Difference in Success Rate by team`^2, data=spring24)
#view model summary
summary(quadraticModel)
summary(quadraticModel1)
summary(quadraticModel2)
```


## Plots
```{r}
ggplot(spring24,aes(x=`CS Percentage Difference`,y=`Winning Percentage Difference`))+geom_point()
ggplot(spring24,aes(x=`SB Difference by team`,y=`Winning Percentage Difference`))+geom_point()
ggplot(spring24,aes(x=`SB Difference in Success Rate by team`,y=`Winning Percentage Difference`))+geom_point()


ggplot(spring24, aes(x=spring24$`CS Percentage Difference`, y=spring24$`Winning Percentage Difference`, color='line of best fit')) +
    geom_point(size=2, color = 'blue') +
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se = FALSE, fullrange = TRUE) +xlab("CS Percentage Difference") +ylab("Winning Percentage Difference") + ggtitle("Difference in Caught Steal Percentage by Team vs \n Difference in Winning Percentage")

ggplot(spring24, aes(x=spring24$`SB Difference by team`, y=spring24$`Winning Percentage Difference`, color='line of best fit')) +
    geom_point(size=2, color = 'blue') +
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se = FALSE, fullrange = TRUE) +xlab("SB Difference by team") +ylab("Winning Percentage Difference") + ggtitle("Difference in Steal Base by Team vs \n Difference in Winning Percentage")

ggplot(spring24, aes(x=spring24$`SB Difference in Success Rate by team`, y=spring24$`Winning Percentage Difference`, color='line of best fit')) +
    geom_point(size=2, color = 'blue') +
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se = FALSE, fullrange = TRUE) +xlab("SB Difference in success Rate by team") +ylab("Winning Percentage Difference") + ggtitle(" Difference in Steal Base Success Rate vs \n Difference in Winning Percentage")

ggplot(spring24_1, aes(x=spring24_1$`SB Difference in Success Rate by team above average`, y=spring24_1$`Winning Percentage Difference above average`, color='line of best fit')) +
    geom_point(size=2, col = 'blue') +
    geom_smooth(method="lm", se = FALSE, fullrange = TRUE) +xlab("SB Difference in Success Rate by team above average") +ylab("Winning Percentage Difference above average") + ggtitle("Difference in Steal Base Success Rate vs \n Difference in Winning Percentage \n (Only Teams with Above Average \n Steal Base Success Rate)")

ggplot(spring24_1, aes(x=spring24_1$`SB Difference by team`, y=spring24_1$`Winning Percentage Difference`, color='line of best fit')) +
    geom_point(size=2, color = 'blue') +
    geom_smooth(method="lm",se = FALSE, fullrange = TRUE) +xlab("SB Difference by team") +ylab("Winning Percentage Difference") + ggtitle("Difference in Steal Base by Team vs \n Difference in Winning Percentage")
```

##WHY SB IS NOT EFFECTIVE
```{r}
cor(spring24_2$`SB`,spring24_2$`OPS`)
model3 <- lm(log(spring24_2$`SB`)~ spring24_2$`HR`)
model4 <- lm(log(spring24_2$`SB`)~ spring24_2$`OPS`)
summary(model3)
summary(model4)
quadraticModel3 <- lm(`SB`~ `HR` + `HR`^2, data=spring24_2)
quadraticModel4 <- lm(`SB`~ `OPS` + `OPS`^2, data=spring24_2)
summary(quadraticModel3)
summary(quadraticModel4)


```
